contentTypeIsEventStream.description: Encoder emits `Content-Type: text/event-stream` for the response.

acceptsLfCrlfAndCrLineTerminators.description:
Decoder accepts each of LF (`\n`), CRLF (`\r\n`), and CR (`\r`) as a line
terminator per WHATWG.

stripsLeadingBom.description: Decoder strips at most one leading UTF-8 BOM per WHATWG.

stripsSingleLeadingFieldSpace.description: Decoder strips a single leading U+0020 SPACE from field values per WHATWG.

dispatchesOnEmptyLine.description: Decoder dispatches the buffered event only on an empty line per WHATWG.

ignoresCommentLines.description:
Decoder treats every line that starts with U+003A COLON as a comment and
does NOT surface those lines as decoded events.

description:
Normative wire characteristics that a conformant encoder MUST honor and a
conformant decoder MUST tolerate. These are presented as observable booleans
so the conformance plan can assert each one independently from a single
decoder observation.
